name: Stuffed Rolls
keywords: breads cheese main dish sandwiches vegetables
recipeInstructions:
These are approximate sizes. Recipe called for 1 small jar of stuffed olives and 1 can of tomato sauce. It should be to your taste.
1. Cut the tops off of the rolls and hollow them out, leaving a thin shell.
2. Grind all of the ingredients (olives, bread) in a meat grinder or food processor until finely ground.
3. Stuff the ground mixture back into the hollowed-out rolls.
4. Place the roll tops back on the rolls and secure with toothpicks.
5. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet at 350 degrees F for about 45 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
